review_text:
We stayed for a weekend with our 3 year old and 3 month old. We had a great time.
The big4 is located about 10 minutes out of town, on ocean beach. We stayed in a superior spa chalet. The chalet had everything you need and we were also offered a high chair and a cot to use. The rooms are huge and we fit a portable bassinet in the main bedroom easily. Our chalet faced a beautiful green lawn with a stunning view and was right near the huge playground (this has a big playground, flying fox, a pirate ship, a toddler playground, 2 bouncy pillows and mini golf). Kangaroos bouncing by and kookaburras singing in the trees!  Staff were lovely and welcoming. We look forward to returning for another stay!

Only thing to note- there isn’t an oven in the rooms. However there is a stove, benchtop frying pan and microwave. Also the fireplace was out of order but that didn’t bother us as we have young children and the aircon was great at heating the chalet.
Chalet was clean and had everything we needed. Lovely big play areas for kids.
Hatten nicht das perfekte Wetter erwischt - trotzdem ist dies eine sehr gepflegte und schöne Anlage. Empfehlenswert.
Family friendly camp site with excellent facilities.
Nice camping area with clean amenities

Excellent park. Great facilities which are actually looked after. Well equipped camp kitchen and an awesome playground!
We even played pickleball on the tennis courts!
And could hear the ocean at night!

Overall the park is good and had everything that’s needed. But it is a very large park and could do with some attention in certain areas.

The concrete slab pitch we were assigned was in a terrible state, the grass was completely gone and it was so so muddy. We drove our van into the space designed to sleep in and it was so wonky!! Luckily we were the end pitch and we had a small ish van so we were able to squeeze onto the other side of the slab which was flatter. The ground could really do with some attention.

The toilets and showers were clean enough, not ideal that the doors are left open constantly.

The coffee stand in the morning was absolutely fab, late arrival process was very seamless. We also were able to see the Milky Way in the evening which was a real highlight for us!
Great place to unwind

Stayed for a week during the April school holidays, huge park with plenty of space. The kids loved the play equipment and the games room/kitchen area for socialising with other young ones.
Toilets / showers were clean (besides other quests not moping out the showers) although this is not a fault of the park. This was our second stay here and I would definitely stay again.

The park was located in a lovely park of Denmark however the facilities were disgusting and dirty 90% of the time. The showers were so disgusting and washed out with blackened dirty water made my stomach turn. The toilet block was so congested lines out the door. Inside was not much better as couldnt tell between the rust and grime. Just above the stalls the spiderwebs were so thick it looked like a horror movie at night. The accommodation fees were not cheap either mind you it was Easter. People at the park had no care in the world walking down the middle of the road as if it was the side walk so it made it difficult and at times dangerous as kids uncontrollably riding bikes and scooters in front of cars. Not good when sun strikes early evening. Should be a bit more controlled than a free for all. Someone will get hurt badly.
Its a very family friendly park but kids are running amok so be careful please. The playgound for kids was great...but kids getting hurt left right and centre. So look after your children. Over all the park was reasonable but could do with some attention to cleaning of the facilities.

We just had an incredible week at BIG4 Denmark Ocean Beach and it has officially become our annual holiday tradition. Honestly, it might be the best BIG4 we have ever stayed at.
The location is perfect because you are right by the inlet and only a quick drive into town. The staff really goes above and beyond to keep things running smoothly, which creates such a relaxed atmosphere. It is one of those rare places where you can actually unwind while the kids have a blast on the playground.
Everything was spotless, including the camp kitchens and the bathrooms. Even during the busy peak season, you can see the team putting in a massive effort to keep the facilities in top shape. It has that classic camping feel but with all the comforts that make it a real vacation.
If you are heading to Denmark, you should definitely stay here. We are already counting down the days until we are back!
Good place to stay and plenty of things to do at the park.. will definitely be back

Great caravan park, well maintained (maybe the older toilet block can use a little upgrade), big sites, amazing kids area with all abilities playground, jumping pillows, basketball/tennis/netball court
Sicko playground
We had a great and wonderful holiday at the park. The staff wre always ready to assist whenever we needed help. The location and facilites were just perfect for us
Enormous park for everyone’s needs, and close to the beach with perfectly manicured walkways and shores, great playground and good facility’s
Good place

Great park, very clean , we had a powered site lot,s off room 😊 extremly busy over easter ..unfortunly due to disrepetful parent,s.. we were woken to screaming kids at 6am 🙄 every morning pretty much most off the day ..i know kids make noise ..but this was screaming ..hence ..the only reason we left a day  early

Very happy with our 4 night stay. Great 2 bedroom Superior Chalet. Beautiful location and all park amenities that we visited seemed clean and tidy. Friendly and helpful staff. Loved the evening visits by the kangaroos!

Only issue we had was the data breech but we realise that was out of your control, just a shame it to so long to get communications from you regarding it. Definitely did not sour our trip though, and had an amazing time!

Thanks for the great hospitality!

Just be aware that if you have a booking at the BIG4 in Denmark and you would like to cancel the dates owing to the fuel and economic crises at the moment and you would like a credit to make a further booking when things have settled they won't allow it. So they keep your money not only happened to us but other friends of ours, they tell you it is a directive from head office, that is not true it is the management at the BIG4 in Denmark.
Beautiful sky! (Service was originally 3 but I fixed it to be 5)

Beautiful big park, good size spaces. Powered RV sites are great 👍 stayed 3 weeks due to car issues. Not bad price. $45 a night, but more expensive over PH nights $77-$81 a night. Our stay averaged $51 a night Powered.  For 2 adults . Great walking, hiking and bike riding, fishing, swimming in the area. Beautiful scenery and beaches ⛱️

Absolutely unacceptable experience with BIG4 Denmark Ocean Beach Holiday Park.

After making a booking, my personal information was exposed through their new online booking system, which led to fraudulent emails being sent out requesting payment. This is a serious failure—customers should not be dealing with phishing scams because a business failed to properly secure the systems they chose to use.

Their response tries to downplay the situation by saying their “internal systems” weren’t compromised and that card details weren’t stored before March 11. That completely misses the point. If your third-party system leaks customer data, that is still YOUR responsibility. Blaming a system you chose to implement just shows a lack of accountability.

This demonstrates poor judgement and a complete lack of due diligence when rolling out a new booking platform. Basic cybersecurity protections should have been in place before exposing customer information—not after the damage is already done.

As a direct result of this, I have now cancelled my holiday and will never be booking with them again. I’ve completely lost trust in how this business handles customer data.

Now customers are left second-guessing every email and worrying about scams—all because of a preventable failure.

Very disappointing and frankly embarrassing for a well-known holiday park brand. I strongly urge others to be extremely cautious.

Leuke speeltuin, goede voorzieningen en elke dag kangoeroes.

Leuke vineyards in de omgeving!!
Nice place, kitchen is huge. I don’t know what else to say.

Big 4 staff were friendly on check in and the amenities were clean and tidy. The location was very good as well, walking distance to the beach. However, they put the sprinklers on regularly which meant our dry washing on the washing line got wet again by the water spraying out and the wind carrying it further, we felt it was unnessesary to water some mud patches… Other than that good stay.

We’re tourists from Singapore and really enjoyed our stay at BIG4 Denmark Ocean Beach. The showers and toilets were clean, and the kids’ play area is huge. The Kitchen is marvelous . Very neat location.

Highlight was the wildlife . we saw many wild kangaroos which made the experience unique.

There’s a café at the main kitchen area , coffee is average but good enough. Overall, a great and relaxing base for exploring the surroundings.

Despite multiple phone calls requesting a credit due to the fuel situation. We called last week, and explained. The man we spoke to had no issue. However not now, no credit. So not recommending this place to anyone else. The women this morning was very rude. We didn't want our money back, just to come at a later time. Shame on you!

We arrived late and had an envelope with the entrance code for that day and instructions.
It was quiet and respectful. Shower was hot and strong.
In the mornings as we left we saw kangaroos around.
Great location, facilities, and general experience. Would definitely recommend people to stop here.
Camped here for two nights, to explore the local area. Facilities were clean and staff are super friendly.
Great place, good size sites, plenty to do in Denmark

This is a very large caravan park which meant that they could accommodate my last minute request for a site during a busy season. The park is well laid out with some tiered sites which creates a sense of spaciousness. Large central ablution and kitchen facilities appeared to cope well with demand. Facilities were clean & well maintained.

Had a lovely week stay here, lovely relaxed park, lovely seeing the kangaroos every evening and morning.   Did feel in some areas of the park vans were packed in and could of done with more room considering how big the park is.  Some of the grassed areas needed attention we were moved sites on arrival as original site was apparently sandy but pitch we were given was very sandy too.

A large campsite featuring chalets and large plots for campers, tents and caravans. Clean and smart toilets/showers,  plus BBQs , laundry and kids play areas.
Close to the inlet which is shallow and clear for swimming.
Really good spot
Wonderful holiday park.

Simply a wonderful place with a very fair price. The amenities are excellent, with a good, spacious kitchen and a great bathroom. It has a lovely atmosphere that truly makes you feel as though you are camping, but without any hardship. The staff member at the front desk, Wayne, was excellent, he treated us with great politeness and was very attentive and kind.

I 100% recommend this place.
Nice atmosphere for a very large caravan park. Prices are good.
Huge caravan park, facilities are good, most sites are reasonably level, numbering system could be better as they can be hard to see.

Staff gave us a spot way too small for our caravan, even though we provided the proper dimensions when we made our booking.

They said we could move, but the other options were just as bad. We asked if we could just leave and refund our 3 nights that we had paid for, but they said that it was not part of their policy. We had only been in the park for half an hour and had to pay for 3 nights….

Don’t take a booking if you can’t fit us.

Location is nice
Amenities awesome
WIFI is an insult to even list it as an option. POOR for a big4, don't get me wrong having no signal is not death but to list it as an option is poor management. tbh for me I would not have booked if the park was clear about WIFI which to me is false advertising.

We stayed at BIG4 Denmark Holiday Park in January this year on a powered site and overall had a great family holiday.

The location is fantastic - close to the inlet and only a short drive into town. The park is great for families, with awesome activities and a really good playground that our kids loved.

Unfortunately, the stay was let down by the ablution facilities. There just aren’t enough toilets and showers for the number of people staying, especially during peak periods. The second ablution block at the back of the park was particularly bad - often dirty, flooded, and not in an acceptable condition, despite the obvious efforts of staff.

We understand January is one of the busiest time of year, but even accounting for this, I do question whether the number and capacity of the facilities meet minimum amenity standards for the number of guests. For the price paid during peak periods, the ablutions really need to be better.

We still enjoyed our holiday, but we hope there will be some serious investment in infrastructure so the facilities can cope properly during busy times.

Positives: clean, hot showers. Plenty of showers & toilet cubicles. Coffee can on site in the mornings is a nice touch (despite the super long wait). Only a short, safe walk to the estuary.
Not so positives: staff were anything but friendly. Walked into the office the main office to buy ice creams, we were looked up and down by the staff members who did not serve us. Eventually abruptly got served by one woman who seemed very put out.
Kids everywhere in bikes and scooters! This is a lovely place to come as a family, but no kids were supervised (parents fault but should need reminding from site staff) on the grounds which was super super dangerous for campers driving in and out.
Glad we only stayed one night

Camping unpowered. It is Australia Day weekend so I get it's busy but the Unpowered area isn't coping. The toilets and kitchens are overwhelmed, dirty, old and queues constantly. If everywhere else wasn't fully booked we would have left. No grass in the Unpowered is either dust or soup depending on the weather.

Location is stunning.

The powered areas looks totally different, way nicer. We would come back but not a chance in unpowered.

This was our first "van park" stay & I was impressed. Despite the crowd & large size of the park itself it was very tidy, had multiple free bbq areas, the toilets were always clean, short/no queuing & the showers were always hot. The playground, jumping pillows & mini golf helped keep my daughter entertained & the local kangaroos were a nice sight for an early riser like myself. My only concern was that we found several ticks (including on me) when breaking down the camper, but we notified the office so hopefully they try to address it. A short walk to the ocean, surf club & multiple lookouts for a swim & picturesque sunrise too.

Like we were camping, just with enough resort comforts that make my wife want to come too. 4.8 stars.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

10/10 – Best BIG4 in Australia

This truly is the best BIG4 park in Australia. The park is huge, but it absolutely has the facilities to back it up. The amenities, including bathrooms and camp kitchens, were always spotless and exceptionally well maintained.

The manager, Megan, runs a tight ship, creating an atmosphere that is relaxed, welcoming, and perfect for families. Parents can genuinely unwind knowing the kids are safe, entertained, and well catered for.

Thank you for such an incredible week. Denmark is our favourite holiday destination in WA, and this campground has officially become our annual family holiday spot. We can’t wait to come back.

Second time visiting here. Very different experience.
Both times on a powered grass site. First time, under trees, second time in the open area. The sites in the open grass area were huge, plenty of space & relatively quiet.  However, they are far from the toilet & showers. The wind was huge downfall of this area.   There's plenty for the kids to do here and only a short walk to the estuary for a swim. The location is perfect to visit the Denmark area, only 20 mins to William Bay National Park

We stayed at the park for a week and enjoyed our time there. I had booked 12 months in advance and requested a caravan site close to the amenities as i have a disability and was quoted a site number upon booking. To be honest, I was a bit disappointed that upon checking in we had been moved to another site with a bit of a walk, which proved a bit challenging for the week. The site was also black boggy dirt covered in leaves which made it difficult to keep things clean. The WIFI was pretty poor or non existent during the week but not a major issue for us.
Apart from those few negatives, the staff are friendly and very helpful and it is a great place to visit, we highly recommend to all travellers.

The camping ground is in a good location and have many amenities for the kids but, just 1 dumping point for all the caravans staying there is crazy. Also not enough toilets and showers. Its a waiting game queuing everywhere you go. No little shop or so ever close by.

But the worst part is that its not save to leave your stuff unattended. People stole from us in a blink of an eye. Keep your things with you all the time.
Convenient camping but wont repeat again.

Wouldn't give us a powered site because we were only staying 3 nights. Apparently require 4 night minimum for a powered site. The free camp area had people packed in like sardines. The toilets were a long walk away and a long wait. Definitely not enough amenities for the amount of people they had jammed in there. Our caravan shower is bigger than the ones on site. The dirt roads don't get watered so all the cars driving past create a heap of dust. Luckily we were out most of the time.
Sensational park! Loved it and can’t wait to book again
Nice campsite and good facilities. Busy and not much privacy, but is in line with what was expected.

Read their small print. Very inflexible booking and refund policies - we paid 100% up front a year ago and due to unforseen circumstances are no longer able to stay. No refund at all offered, not even a part refund.

We are currently staying at Denmark Ocean Beach Holiday Resort in the unpowered camping area. When we arrived, the resort was extremely full. After a long search, we eventually found a spot and set up our tents — only to later realise that we are camped directly behind the sewage tanks.
The smell is overwhelming and constant, making it very unpleasant to stay here. More concerning, this is a clear health hazard, especially for campers sleeping in tents.
Possible health risks include:
1. Exposure to harmful bacteria and pathogens from sewage
2.Respiratory irritation, nausea, and headaches from sewage gases
3.Increased risk of gastrointestinal illness
4.Attraction of flies, insects, and vermin
5.Higher risk for children, elderly people, and those with weakened immune systems
This area should be clearly cordoned off and not offered as a camping site at all. Allowing guests to camp next to sewage infrastructure is completely unacceptable and unsafe.
Amazing place with full of amenities and services, plenty of thing to do around 😀

We stayed between Christmas and New year break. The park is quite and the location is very good. We chose an unpowered site and were happy with it.

There is a lack of abolution blocks. We are in the back so did not see the one in the middle as too far. The back bathroom facilities need updating. For the sheer number of people packed in the back end, there is a que to use the facilities at peak times. You have to line up to even use the toilet. There is also a sewage smell at times where our camp is set up.

The kitchen is full and very busy. We have a camper trailer and were thankful to have our own kitchen to cook and fo dishes.

Overall not a bad experience. Just not into crowded caravan parks with not enough facilities to accommodate.
Great spot, good facilities, heaps to do for kids. Camp site sizes are decent.
Nice place for camping

Do not stay in unpowered section! I stayed here thankfully for only one night, I stayed in the unpowered section, which seems to be located near their waste management system and the smell of sewage was disgusting, I couldn’t cook by/in my van with the smell. Staff are very nice, not a bad park once you steer clear of unpowered section

Stayed over Christmas break, powered sites super shady and private. Wanted to thank Steve the groundskeeper for being so helpful throughout our stay. We were so appreciative for him going above and beyond when we had problems with our trailer plug. Absolute legend!
Awesome park, great staff. Great amenities. 10 minute drive to town.

Its a caravan park.
Great facility, terrific location.

If you have kids, they are well catered for.

도착했을때 어두운 밤에 캥거루가 아주 많았습니다.
쏟아지는 별과 수 많은 캥거루, 잠들고 싶지 않았어요.
하지만 다음 날 아침에 캥거루가 그대로 있어주어서 감사했습니다.

absolutely loved our stay here the lots are great size
Ammenities are cleaned daily
The park itself is clean and tidy.
The caretakers and staff are just lovely and do. An amazing job maintaining the park.
The camp kitchen is equipped with everything.
Kangaroos and Ducks a plenty and great fishing across the road
Great coffee van and AWESOME fish n chips van

Nice place. The staff upon check in were extremely friendly and helpful. Short explanation , but extremely clear.
We had a powered grass site - kangaroos everywhere, nice and quiet.
The facilities were exceptional - big, private, and very clean. Showers were nice pressure, lovely hot water.

This caravan park is not beachfront nor does it have beach access. It is a very short drive from the beach that is closed.. The beach carpark and surf lifesaving is all closed off (November 2025) there is only access to the dog beach. This caravan park is very child friendly and has many facilities. The back bathrooms were continually dirty, even after the cleaner just walked out, the fans were filled with a years worth of dust and the walls were not wiped down, lots of things were missed so we ended up using the main bathroom block wich was much cleaner 🙂 the unpowered area is unallocated which is a good idea so you're not camping ontop of other people. However this area did attract some noisy people who stayed up making noise past 2 am each night. Pet friendly park and a nice place to bring your pets. Staff here are super friendly and helpful. A great place to stay if you're visiting the area.

Stayed here for 3 nights on a powered site. Our spot wasn’t as grassy as some of the others, more of a mix of black sand and patchy grass. We did get a bit flooded during an afternoon downpour, but it drained away fairly quickly, so not too bad.

Amenities were clean and tidy, and the site size was pretty reasonable and quiet

The only downside was the bugs, around 4pm each day it turned into a bit of a mozzie fest, so we mostly hung out indoors in the late afternoons.
We stayed 2 nights in September, booked one powered site and one 3BR unit. Overall the place is beautiful, quiet, and value for money. Night time you can see kangaroos come out and mingle around.
Great place to stay, cabin very comfortable, access easy. Nice atmosphere with wildlife present.

We stayed at a powered sight
Great spot
Caravanning, great spot ,plenty of room ,clean amenities, good fishing in area .
Poor internet reception only draw back.
Excellent in summer when its full I'm sure. Very relaxing atmosphere but by 7pm the place was quite. Amenities Excellent.

It's a nice place for a camping trip. There are restrooms and showers with hot water. There is also a kitchen with a microwave, an electric kettle and a barbecue. There is also a small seating area in the kitchen with a sofa, TV and books.
Sadly, on the last day of my stay, there was no hot water or electricity.

This place definitely had strengths and weaknesses.  For strengths, the staff were lovely, especially the front desk and cleaning staff.  The grounds are beautiful - we were in the unpowered section out the back and you are in a little forest with the roos, ducks and kookas which is lovely.  The playground is great and lots of free sports equipment. The ocean beach area is stunning and wild and there is a lovely dog beach just across the road, perfect if you are traveling with your furbabies.

Unfortunately there were a lot of flaws.  They had constant problems with water, sewage and power during our four day stay which was very disruptive to everyone at the park.  It also meant us walking a lot further to use a different bathroom block and camp kitchen.  I get that that may just be bad luck, however it was also clear that the facilities cannot accommodate the number that they get to the park.  Things get very dirty, lots of rubbish, flies and cockroaches inside the kitchen areas, and poor signing explaining the difficult barbecues.  Lots of the facilities out the back section are prefab.  It needs an overhaul and more investment in cleaning to truly show off the beauty of the site it is on.

Wouldn’t stay here again but thank the lovely staff and beautiful animals for the special moments we did have xxxx

7 adults - One Night stay.

We enjoyed a very comfortable stay after a girls day in Denmark. The ladies in reception were so amazing and extremely accommodating and organised an early check in for us. We would definitely stay again.

Wonderful. Lovely place. Great views. Plenty for children to enjoy. Visited in school holidays in September 2025. Professional staff. Well managed. Lots of space for everone, rooms n chalets n powered-sites for caravans. Good wifi. A bit expensive but seems worth it.

Beautiful quite park on the inlet.
Spectacular views over the water.
Highly recommend this park.

A Perfect Stay at Denmark BIG4!

WA couple travelling with first time visitors to WA.

From the moment we arrived, the staff at reception made us feel so welcome—it was like being greeted by old friends. They were incredibly lovely and accommodating, going out of their way to make sure our stay was smooth and enjoyable.

The park itself is beautifully maintained, with lush greenery, clean amenities, and plenty of space to relax. Whether you’re traveling with family, pets, or just looking for a peaceful getaway, this place ticks all the boxes. The location is ideal too—close to Ocean Beach and surrounded by nature.
Very well maintained park. Accommodating reception for late arrivals and late departures. Imagine during peak time it would be a hive of activity.
Called in to make a delivery  - fantastic reception ladies. Looks like a great place to stay.

We stayed here for 5 nights and really enjoyed it.The caravan park is set in beautiful grounds with great sites. The amenities are excellent,  staff so friendly.  There are some lovely walks at the beach, nice trip into Denmark definitely do the chocolate company .

I stayed in denmark for one night, the powered site I was on was lovely and central to the park amenities. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. The bathrooms were clean and tidy and great water pressure. Overall I would definitely stay here again if I return.
Love this caravan park. Lots of Kangaroos around the park. Good amenities.
We stayed in a stunning Superior Chalet two bedroom and it far exceeded our expectations.  Thoroughly recommend this place.
The lady at reception was so friendly, funny and welcoming. The chalets were super clean and comfortable. Excellent location super close to the beach. Will definitely be back 🙂

Stayed a week. Best park in our 5 months on the road. Great staff good over and beyond to help. Amenities awesome, no complaints. Park for kids had everything, it's huge. Roos hopping a t ound too. Didn't want to leave. Dysons on detour
Staff are really friendly, 10/10 would higly recommend, high standards of cleanliness in the chalets and amenities.
一來到，就比個playground吸引，泊好車，見到啲袋鼠係自己周邊走來走去。鸚鵡飛來飛去。即刻去reception 比錢住多日。wifi要近toilet先收得好。

This is a great place,
Friendly staff, super clean facilities, outstanding camp kitchen...
But, the unpowered site was littered with tree debris on soggy uneven ground, frequently under trees.
There was no hot water in the showers, and after free camping in National Parks for a few days, that is really what I was paying for...

We had a powered tent sites for 3 nights and absolutely loved it. Excellent amenities that where clean and well maintained. Friendly staff with local knowledge just couldn't ask for more. Will definitely be back. Highly recommend if you want to relax and enjoy your time in denmark.

A Fantastic Stay – We’ll Be Back!

We travelled down from Mandurah for a 7-night stay during the cooler months and were thoroughly impressed. The park is fantastic—clean, green, and well maintained. We loved the abundance of kookaburras and kangaroos, which added a special touch to the experience.

Being dog-friendly was a big plus for us, as we brought our old boy along. The location is great, with beautiful views and excellent fishing spots just a short drive away.

Honestly, there’s nothing we could fault. A wonderful getaway, and we’ll definitely be returning..

Fantastic location and the chalets are beautifully presented.
We have stayed here numerous times and as always the park and chalets are always clean and tidy.
The staff are always friendly and helpfull.
Great Park, five stars
Very nice place and comfy

Beautifully kept caravan park with plenty of trees, green grass, dog friendly, dog beach across the road, dog park a short driving distance. Toilets were reasonably clean, but could improve (doors need wiping down on inside of toilets). Friendly helpful staff and great facilities for families with children. Lots of birds and kangaroos too 🦘🐦. Be aware that there is no TV reception which would have been nice to have in the cold weather as didn't spend much time sitting outside. Also phone internet reception not great either for those who may want/need it

We stayed in Chalet. Staff very friendly.
We love the location. (Great walks close by.)
Nice park grest for our kids loved the wild kangaroos affordable too for families

Pleasant caravan park
My chalet lacked for nothing
Any problems were sorted out quickly
Nice big Caravan bays..pet friendly.Lots of Kangaroos..relaxing..free bus to the brewery too

Huge park, very tidy, lots of amenities and a family bathroom, play area was awesome, loved the flying fox, lots of kangaroos  and ducks in the park (look out for the poo and careful not to walk in it)

Good park if you don’t stay in the unpowered section out the back. Entirely sandy, and the bathrooms are subsequently filthy. The bathrooms seem an after thought as they are just portable buildings. We chose to walk to the main toilet block. Location is unreal.
Great caravan park, well maintained and great customer service. Will stay again.

Stayed with our caravan. Excellent park. Great playground for the kids, with climbing equipment and jumping pillow. Also Putt Putt. Sites are well looked after. Ablution blocks are kept clean. Have stayed here twice now and are already thinking of when we'll come again.
Great camping spot! Clean facilities, and peaceful surroundings. Perfect for a relaxing getaway in nature. Highly recommend.
Love this caravan park. Lots of room for kids to have fun in. Great play area. Close to beach. The cabins are so comfortable and clean.

Depending upon where you are pitched can really affect your stay. The amenities at the top of the park were poor( think porta cabin/ music festival ). If you are at the top of the park use the main block of showers and kitchen (near the entrance). No lighting at the top of the park can be very disorientating.
For a Big4 we were a little disappointed.
Facilities need some investment.

Amazing and beautiful park right across the inlet. Amazing scenery all around. Lovely staff and great amenities make this an easy repeat option when me and my family come down south! Thanks manager Megan for being hands on and very helpful. Will see you again soon!
Great staff, clean park. Sites are sandy but that is  all part of camping at the beach!
Great place! Clean, friendly staff. 💯 recommended
Great location, average facilities. Very dated shower/bathrooms with decent hot water. Laundry services out of order which we were relying on. None of the BBQ's in the kitchen had gas.

Le camping est bien situé, à côté de la plage et des points de départ pour les randonnées, pas loin de Greens pool (24 minutes en voiture).
L’Accueil n’était pas très professionnel, les emplacements non alimenté en électricité sont dans le sable au fond du camping où nous ne captons pas la wifi. La cuisine est très bien.
Jolie parc de jeu pour les enfants

Great location with friendly staff and just amazing location close to Ocean beach which simply an amazing beach and beautiful ocean for swimming and surfing. Also well priced compared to other holiday parks that are more pricey.
A very comfortable stay in a perfect location. Staff were super friendly and lovely to deal with. Rooms were clean and comfortable.
Great site. Beach is amazing and loved all the roos in the site at dusk.
Nice quiet  stay.  Shower was pretty  R/S.   Bed SoSo.  But we had a great look around the area.

Huge park located outside of town near Ocean Beach , a 15-minute walk away . Understandably, being there in mid-March, the park was attempting to recover after the holidays but needed more ground staff to achieve this . The facilities were adequate, needing to be attended more often .If in a caravan site out the back,PH area ,ensure that the site is an even number so as to be protected from the severe winds that are possible all year round.
Great, friendly staff!!
Great location and a great big park. We stayed in our fifth wheeler and we loved our time there as did our kids.

Great park to stay if you have kids and don't want to leave. Lots of equipment, volleyball court, mini golf , air trampoline. Just a little too far out of town and a decent walk to the beach/water.
They do offer a bus to Boston brewery, tho limited pickup times.

We are seasoned travellers .We have stayed in cleaner free camps. Our site is a block of dirty sand. Amenities are disgusting only three  washing machines work and they are filthy. Reviews from 3 months ago said waiting on parts. Not good for a big four. Drove 3000 klms. Very disappointed. Sincerely Paul. P.S not worth membership.
Grounds at the back of the park are dirty, overflowing bins every day. Staff at reception great

There was no phone signal here. The WiFi didn’t work at all.
We had an unpowered site which was right at the back in the forest. We had to park in the mud.
Bathroom was clean and showers were hot. $32 dollars was a good price though.
The seaside bites has Slowest service take away in Australia
Nice

Well where do I start, I should of read more into the reviews, I thought the front office staff were part supposed to be friendly not rude and abrupt Fiona has no customer service skills I’ll leave it at that. Park wants to charge $5 dog fee p/night, this is the only Big 4 park I have encountered that want to charge a dog fee, why 🤷‍♂️ they are not allowed off the leash they are not allowed in the camp kitchen area, they are not allowed in the amenity block, they are not allowed in the playground, although most dogs are better behave than kids, is this another money grab? Sites are disgusting get charged top dollar for a block of dirt especially in cockatoo court and wombat, way, it’s ok to ask what the length of the van is but then the road is only 4mtrs wide and it’s impossible for campers to reverse in even if the site opposite is vacant, we watched at least 6 travellers try only to go else where. We were told no check in until 1200hrs so our site could be cleaned, crap! I had to level the site to get my van in even then it sank in the dirt yes complete dirt, so I had to put half tyre on slab to keep it level, over grown grass on edges and around water drain, broken tent pegs and rubbish that we had to pick up prior to setting up the bloke next to me got bogged that bad a tow truck was called to get him out, some trees look very hazardous, park really needs a major make over to be honest didn’t see a decent site. On a positive note Nick in the coffee van makes an unreal coffee, he should be manager of the park he’s genuine it’s a shame as Denmark is a beautiful little town with a great feel then the park lets you down. Big 4 do you do any diligence on parks before putting your name at the front!!
Nice camp site with decent facilities (kitchen, BBQs, laundry). Some showers could do with an update but overall a pleasant place to stay.

Der Ort ist wunderschön! 5min zu Fuß zu Ocean Beach. Super schön zum chilln oder laufen :) Wir waren zwei Nächte mit unserem Camper da. Unser Stellplatz mit Strom haben wir online reserviert. Alles hat super geklappt. Duschen/Wc/ Küche waren sauber ! Wir haben sogar in der früh Kängurus gesehen.
Das einzige Minus für mich ist, dass vor Ort kein kleinen Kiosk ist. Das ist aber schon meckern auf hohem Niveau :)
Good place to camp and can take your pets but the shower and toilets really need a revamp they are full of mould throughout and the shared kitchen is way to small
Its bad bad bad, called many times for how many days now and all i got is answering machine, left many voicemail but no call back.
Close to the beach, unpowered sites under shade, clean facilities

Camped in our caravan.Lovely big sites compared to most other camp sites.Facilities are clean and well maintained. They have on site coffee shop, ok coffee but at $9 for a large its a bit much!!!. Other than that plenty for the kids to keep entertained,  jumping pillows, go cart hire, play grounds etc. Close to Ocean Beach, a fantastic surf life guarded beach.
Over price only because of school holidays, will price themselves out of it,people cannot afford to pay those costs no wonder the older generation do not come to the caravan parks,

We recently camped here with several friends for about 10 nights. The powered camp sites we had were generous in size, easily accommodating our two tents and marquees. Overall the facilities are kept quite clean, especially considering how busy the park was while we were there, the showers were clean, had great water pressure and never ran out of hot water.

Mostly a pleasant experience. The only "cons" were: I think we must have been put in a smokers section, because 5 of the surrounding groups were smoking, which stank out our site quite often. The management drove by, slowed to look at someone smoking and then kept driving. As a non-smoker, it was quite off putting. There were also a few very noisy groups, with kids screaming late into the night at times, but it was quiet most nights.

Best part is the proximity to Ocean Beach and the channel, although it wasn't much of a channel this time (absolutely nothing the caravan park can do about that obviously).

I'd recommend bringing your own coffee making equipment or going into town with a keep cup, because the coffee van charges $9 for a large coffee! It is good coffee, but not worth $9.

Otherwise, we had a great time camping there, our kids loved the playground & jumping pillow. The kangaroos were frequent visitors and were pretty chilled out.

Edit: Maybe a reminder to people as they check in that it is supposed to be a non-smoking site and some enforcement would be good.

Fantastic location with plenty of activities for the kids, tons of shade to pitch a tent under, and fishing right across the road.

Staff were friendly and helpful.

I would come back

Not a bad stay! Really loved the free shuttle they offer to the local brewery. Unpowered is choose-your-own spot, but we found a great spot not too far from the ablutions. Might be a bit rough being further than we are since the ablutions are only at the start of the unpowered section. Camp kitchen is nice and big! Facilities were cleaned 3x per day when we were there.

Place is beautiful always
Staff are brilliant
I love this place. It's like a social hub, set up in the bush, here you meet people from all walks of life. The staff are wonderful too.
It was good place
Very fun

DO NOT stay in the unpowered section here!
Everyone is crammed in on top of each other in what is essentially a dust bowl. There doesn’t seem to be a limit on the number of unpowered bookings the park takes so evenings are loud and chaotic. The amenities are filthy and full of mould. For the most part they also seem to be the temporary sort you’d find on mine sites.
The comments made by the park here that they are happy to move unhappy guests is inaccurate, you are only able to move sites if you are willing to pay the additional cost to move to a powered site.

The caravan park is very busy with families given its school holidays. The shower block ventilation vans are absolutely filthy beyond belief, can’t imagine how the staff can miss or overlook it. Many of their park rules are ignored by guests & staff imo just pack us in.
Well maintained park with good facilities. Denmark town is 10 mins and Dog friendly beach is less than 3 mins.
Crowded but really fun and awesome

The location is great, being right next to Ocean beach and Prawn pool, but that's about it. The site is very basic, with everybody crammed together. Unfortunately had to stay in the unpowered section which was grim. Really poor for a big camping chain

Glad we only stayed here for one night it was very noisy in the unpowered section, my partner and I couldn’t get to sleep until very late. We had a family pull up right next to us at 9.30pm to start setting up camp with screaming children. No one appeared to care about the noise rule as there was still families in the camp kitchen cleaning dishes, a family playing loud music near the bbqs and people walking straight through our camp site chatting/laughing loudly well after 10pm. There was also young children riding their bikes up and down the ramps to the toilets with no parents in site and one kid was even washing their feet in the basin…

I think they need some staff checking the park more often to make sure people are doing the right thing as it was a very dissapointing experience. We couldn’t even ring the after hours number to complain about the noise because we had zero reception and the wifi was hopeless.

Recently had a powered site stay with no booking made prior, just popped in and asked for availability. Super busy being so close to Christmas, people everywhere I don’t know if I’ve ever been to such a busy caravan park. but regardless it didn’t feel crammed together & overcrowded. Lots and lots of amenities available so there’s no lines to wait in when you need a shower or the toilet. Food van, coffee van, large playground & tennis courts/volleyball. Seems to have everything you’d need on holiday. Up the road is a fairly sheltered popular swimming spot, and access to the beach a little past that.

This is a really clean and tidy caravan park, the location is fantastic, close to Denmark, Ocean Beach and the inlet.
It has a coffee van , and a fish and chip shop on site as well as a visiting Chinese restaurant
The sites are a bit pokey where we were put, and it was a dead end road with very little room for manoeuvring, make sure when you book the van fits the site, we parked over a fence just to get the draw bar of the road, and had to move away from a sprinkler pole and could not use our awning

Long story short they would not consider our stay for the 'holiday deals' that was posted on the website. When I paid online it did not show the deal which was 'stay 3 pay 2'. Anyway we emailed the park about 10mins after booking and realising the deal. Got a reply next day saying deal was only thru the park directly and can be availed via email or phone. This was not stated on the promo discription. We just cannot believe they could not honor this offer. Even spoke to reception next day they still said no. It is an existing deal that is not properly advertised on the website and was not offered on check out. Kinda ruined our stay really. Was gonna extend our stay but very annoyed about this.

Update:

Ammended rating.

Had to extend our stay due to unforseen reasons. The staff on duty that day gave us the discount for all our stay which was great. It was un uneccesary stress but all good now. Other than that liked the area, big playground, lots of kangaroo around, short walk to a nice beach and saw a shark close up too.
Close to beaches and fishing spots
Great park, excellent facilities, friendly staff and in a top spot. Five stars all the way...Brad

Lovely place to stay overnight. However, we were given a powered site with a lot of kangaroo droppings. Was also disappointed with the Laundry room with half of the machines there were out of order. Aside from that, it was a lovely stay. Toilet & shower were clean and well-maintained. The coffee cart nearby was a nice touch.

$15 fee for bringing in a pet - what nonsense. The only reason I agreed to stay here was a 'stay 3 nights, pay for 2' deal - otherwise the pet penalty would have been a hard no. I've read the Park's responses to other comments on this high fee, and I don't buy it ('making pet owners responsible' was the best). There are a minority parks around the country charging extra for a pet - but the Big4 Denmark is the highest we've ever seen (been on the road for a year now). You need to remove your 'pet friendly' tag - clearly whoever runs this park isn't a fan.

Pre booked for 3 nights, 2 adults powered site. Out of town a few kilometres towards the beach and it’s a well presented, quiet and serviced park. Staff were lovely, site was level and spacious and the amenities spotless and really well appointed. Grounds are immaculate and sites spaced all through the natural bush areas.
The only issue I had was only two of five washing machines being available, creating  delays. Plenty of line space. Visiting kangaroos wandering the park kept the camera busy.  It was a really great place for our base as we visited the surrounding areas.
Great........ plenty of stuff to do keeps kids busy..........
Tent/Caravan trip for a week
Lovely powered site. Friendly staff highly recommended
Was very upset all the reviews said great place yes it was nice but school holidays and raining only 2 washing machines and 2 dryers 3 of both out of order and the amenity don’t think cleaned at all
We camped, and it was lovely! Kangaroos at all times of the day, families of ducklings, and heaps of space out the back. The common kitchen areas are big and clean, as are the bathrooms.
Hats off to Toni campi head cleaner, five Star
Nice and clean

Absolutely amazing 🤩 the best quaint bushland filled with flora and fauna. Nestled against the back drop of the Denmark inlet this place is a treat for caravans, backpackers, chalets and even rolling out a swag.
Great caravan park that is well maintained and well managed. Friendly & accomodating reception staff makes it even better. Well done. If only more parks were like this.
Good park but we were a long way to the Loo and it rained all.night so it was an issue

We cannot understand why we had to pay $15 for our small dog when she sleeps eats and resides in our van. We also supplied our own poo bags. So what is the fee for. For the size of the park the main ammenities and dump point are along way from the outer grassed sites where we were placed. Amenities were reasonably clean but doubt if they had been cleaned during our 4day stay. Generally overall nice park close to walking paths and dog friendly beach. Staff friendly.

很大的公園
很棒的廚房設施跟遊樂器材
可惜wifi有點爛
Optus沒有訊號
Dog friendly. 5 star

What a beautiful caravan park. Walking distance to beach & park for pinics.
Caravan Park so clean & well maintained. The ablution blocks are massive, no queues ever. The camp kitchen & undercover outdoor bbq's also very clean. Recycling bins as well.
This was our 2nd stay & definitely won't be the last.
Spacious cabin with open view. Walking distance to ocean beach
Great caravan park. Staff are all so friendly and helpful. Makes alwayswant to return.
Lovely place

Chairs are to low you need to put a cushion on them. Toilet seat wants falls

down, not good for old blokes Lol

Good park tidy and family friendly also thought the food vans were a nice addition. The only suggestion would be to add a fold down change table to the family bathrooms as this would have helped getting my baby dressed off the wet floor.
Park is in a great location. Very large park so was extremely busy during school holidays/long weekend. Lots of amenities, although 2/5 washing machines weren't working, and they need to be cleaned.
Amenities are very good. Could do with more grass.

Lovely location and nice to camp among the peppermint trees! Beware when booking an unpowered site. The unpowered area is not allocated and is a first in scenario. I’m sure this works most of the time. A bit of a schemozzle over the Easter long weekend.

Great experience camping in unpowered camp area. They have a new kitchen room which becomes a hive of activity in the evening. Thanks to everyone who mops the shower after themselves. Shame on the people that walk away leaving a wet muddy mess.

A really well managed park with spacious bays and spotless ablution blocks. Kids play area, tennis court and mini golf is away from main van Park area. Courtesy bus available. We recommend the leave at 5 and back 8 to the brewery trip. Play equipment available. Asian food truck on weekends. Not the best end of the inlet for kayaking but its closest to the beach. Lots of chalet options.
Would have scored higher except out of 5 washing machine only 2 work, same as driers.  Not much fun in a full caravan park . Plenty of showers toilets and clean.  Nice park, good size sites.
Nice lawned park with the modern very clean ablution block, great childrens playground and mini golf tennis courts and much more. We would definitely stay here again.

시설이 아주 잘 되어있고 밤에 캥거루가 출몰합니다 귀여움.. 근처 해변들도 멋있어요
근데 샤워기가 좀 불편해요

Had a site that was very sandy and tight to get the van in. Had alot of trouble levelling the van in the soft sand. There were sites at the back that were better with grass. Don't stay on a slab site ask for a grass site at the back. We didn't know until we were set up and went for a walk around the park.

Stayed here over the long weekend to go to the Summersalt festival on Saturday . Arrived at 5pm on Friday arvo. We were camping on what the caravan park advertised as the grassed  area under the trees. What a joke, we ended up on black sand, no grass. There was also a massive dip in the ground with planks of rotting wood with nails sticking up. I got out of the car and fell into the dip, and rolled my ankle, then noticed the wood with the nails. I could have stood on that.
They have a no noise policy after 10pm .. really? Wouldn’t have known, the campers next to us were talking loudly and laughing like hyenas and kicking a soccer ball until 12.30 pm.
So with no sleep and a sprained ankle we didn’t go to the Festival,  $380 wasted.
Also the shower blocks in donga’s are infested with mould, this is extremely dangerous and toxic.
However from what I could see, the facilities for kids look great, and the camp kitchen was impressive.
Such a shame our experience was less than good, we actually left on Sunday morning instead of Monday.
Awesome park. Kangaroos come to visit early morning.

Very clean park. Ablution blocks kept clean despite the park being very busy. Although there was a constant turn over and a lot of people staying there was plenty of room and quiet. Big sites, grassed and flat.

Highly recommended.

Ocean Beach? Only if you have a car or helicopter.  That said, the amenities are excellent and the best camp kitchen. Plenty grill plates and all very clean. Big fridge to keep your beers cold.  And a free bus to a brewery can't be bad. The staff are fantastic, especially the nice lady with baby brain. As she called it. It was hot. A fantastic stay
Good amenities lovely spot under a tree which was nice to set swag up under would definitely stay again
Very friendly staff and even the kangaroos come and greet you

Little bit of something for everyone here
Plenty of room  if required
& options on camping

This place is poorly managed. Had a booking and we had to reschedule our stay due to unforeseen circumstances. Tried to call multiple times, tried to email, contact via website never got hold on anyone... This is a total shame!!! Left messages on the voicemail, no one called me back. Anyway, just lost some money and we will definitely not go to this place during our stay in Denmark.
We stayed in our caravan the sites are huge so easy for a large van to get into

The amenities are very good, unfortunately what lets this caravan park down is the grassed sites have no grass on them just boggy sand where you can’t even put a folding chair down without sinking it. They should definitely look at this problem. They have also have concrete pad which are good but you to pay a lot more for them. I wasn’t prepared to pay for that extra cost. It has the potential to be a great caravan park.

Great location - easy 30 minute drive to the beautiful Greens Pool. Easily some of the best customer service we have experienced on our south WA trip. Quite busy, however understandably so with time of year and given that park has great family orientated feel. Nice and vibrant, would definitely visit again! Stayed on a non powered site so can’t comment on room standard hence the empty stars. Highly recommend to all!!!
Visited my sister who,was staying, madness unless you have kids then awesome

Liebes Big4 Team,
leider kann ich ihnen nicht mehr als 2 Sterne geben.
Wir sind seid 4 Monaten in Neuseeland und Australien auf Campingplätzen unterwegs und können es gut vergleichen.
Ihr Platz war was die Sanitäranlagen und Küche anging mit der schlechteste.
Die Toiletten und Duschen waren furchtbar dreckig. Schimmel, Staub, Dreck und damit verbunden schlechter Geruch.
Das in der Ferienzeit sehr viele Menschen in ihrem Park Urlaub machen verstehe ich. Doch wenn sie so viele Menschen dort wohnen lassen, müssen sie viel öfter reinigen. Es war wirklich eine Zumutung.
Auch in der Küche waren die Kühlschränke sehr verdreckt und mit toten Fliegen bestückt.
Beim Abwasch lief das Wasser unten auf dem Boden.
Wir waren 5 Tage bei ihnen und an keinem Tag wurde es besser.
Wenn sie das verbessern könnten wäre ihr Park perfekt.
Sie haben eine gute Lage und mit ihren Tieren einen wundervollen Ort.
Standard BIG4 fare .. great resources for families.  Clean and well maintained facilities.  100m from beach. Dog friendly.

It's a great for families and groups of campers and is exceptionally busy during Christmas school holidays. Very big park.  Location great for the Ocean Beach. We will stay at a caravan park in town next time

Nice caravan park with friendly staff. However the back of the park is not very well kept. At the front there are beautiful grass sites and slabs...but the unpowered section is so sandy, not even in most areas and no grass in sight. The sand is not even level and hard sand, I literally saw a campervan get bogged because the sand was so deep.
Nice camping park, kitchen, toilet and bathrooms are neat and tidy

Good location, staff attend promptly to needs, cheap accomodation! Unfortunately some of the people that stay are a little disrespectful with their music at night. It isn’t a doof.. it is a caravan park with many children too!

Great location with a walk across the road to the inlet from the ocean. The inlet is safe and clean for kids to swim. The Park is well maintained with terrific facilities. Highly recommended place to stay.
Thanks to the friendly staff at Denmark Ocean Beach Holiday Park
Some good points but bathrooms could have been cleaner, too much kangaroo poop and felt too commercialized, ok for a one night stay
What a great location and facility! Incredible for all travellers, families, and pet friendly 👏
Great caravan park. Very friendly staff. We will be back
Big 4 parks really do have great facilities. Very family oriented. Best location for a caravan park in Denmark. If you want ocean you got it straight out front.
Had a great stay here in a cabin. Would definitely recommend. Beautiful position close to beach.
Wie schön es ist weiss man erst wenn man dort ist...soviele Kängurus...super schöne Stellplätze...einfach toll

Clean and big facilities so no waiting for toilets or showers. Great location and you’ll see kangaroos jumping around at dusk. The price was fair so would highly recommend this holiday park. The only downside is that the wifi, was not the best and some of the washing machines were out of order.
Nice park. The sprinklers that come on around 8am covered car and boat in filthy salty water. Quite annoying. Bed also like a rock hard trampoline. Other than that great park.
Large powered sites, bathrooms were clean and real family friendly caravan park right near the inlet and beach can’t wait to come back

Very spacious
Grounds tidy , back amenities tidy but showing age only 1 toilet in the male toilet block usable but all kept clean

Highly recommended park to enjoy your stay.

Toilet & shower: excellent, most importantly separate family toilet plus shower available.

Kitchen &outdoor cooking: Excellent

Site: Highly suitable for Caravan & tents

No-smoking on site: Great value

Kids playground: Best

Staff & response: Top class & quick

Access to beach: very close walking distance

Nice well maintained caravan park with lots of great facilities for families and lots of beautiful green grass sites. The park is a 10 min drive to town.
UNFORTUNATELY
We were allocated a very disappointing site facing directly to strong onshore winds right at the entry to the caravan park . We were unable to put our awning due to strong winds. Our site faced the very hot north sun and as our fridge and pantry are on this side it all struggled to stay fresh. Our peanut butter, Vegemite and honey went to liquid. I don’t understand why we were given the worst site furthest from the toilet block and camp kitchen with no protection or privacy -there were SO many nice sites available -so much for just rejoining a big 4 membership

It's a great campsite. With all required facilities and entertainment for children. Playground is excellent. Kids played there all the time.
Not far from the beach. 10 minutes drive feom the Denmark.
Excellent 👏👏

We had a lovely 2 night stay in the Superior Chalet. It has a lovely sunrise view plus kangaroo and ducks to join you for your morning coffee.
The kids playground is beyond awesome. Thw internet was impressively fast!
The chalet was clean, well accommodated and functional. I'd definitely stay here again! Thanks for the lovely time!
Large, modern two bedroom cabin with a huge TV with Netflix. Very happy with our decision to stay here.
Fantastic stay,looking forward to the next visit
Good large sites some with concrete slabs nice neat park with good facilities

We love staying at this caravan park and the great job the staff do. A big shout out to Jake for helping us out with our camper on our site  and to the manager Megan and office staff, who do such a wonderful job. Thank you for the lovely stay!! We will be coming back soon!!
Great get away with the family and parents..warm snug cabins. Quiet caravan park

My family and I have stayed here a few times in the campgrounds, chalets etc and have loved each one! At Christmas we came with family and stayed in one of the Villas and it was perfect. Such large rooms with so much space to hang out and enjoy family time and we were so grateful they told us we could have a cot and high chair added in there for our son at no extra charge.

We absolutely loved that we could just book the courtesy bus that they offer to Boston's brewery for dinner and everyone got to have a drink and get home safely instead of having to cook dinner because that's the last thing I want to do on holiday 🤣

We stayed again this weekend just gone as we heard the inlet across the road was opening back up but due to last minute travel plans we stayed in our van with the kids and we had the best time waking up to see the kangaroos hopping around whilst we had a cuppa. Finished our days off by playing down at the playground with a few games of mini golf and walks over to the inlet.

The staff at this park are a huge part of what keeps bringing us back as they are so friendly and nothing is an issue as they are always happy to help or recommend a good hike, place for lunch etc.

Highly recommend this place and we will continue the tradition of having our family vacations here and watching the park grow 😀
Friendly staff. Large sites. Amenities are good. Camp kitchen good.  Play area for the kids is really great. Worth staying.
Modern tidy great view
Nice camping kitchen facility.

Recently stayed in a 2 bedroom Superior Chalet and we loved it. We were in Chalet 3 which is set a little apart from the rest of them in a small group of 4; this was perfect for us. The chalet was modern and updated. The couch was probably the best I can remember in any holiday accommodation (a big sectional that could actually fit the whole family), the gas fire was lovely and warm. Kitchen was well-equipped, although no oven.
My daughter's favourite part was taking an evening walk to see all the kangaroos. The jumping pillow and huge playground were great too.
We brought our dog for which there's an extra fee - fair enough - and it was great to be able to have him with us.
All the staff we encountered were friendly and helpful.
